title: Slabs & Layers+
description: Adds More Slabs And Layer Versions Of Blocks To Vanilla Minecraft
body:
This Mod adds a bunch of new Slabs & Layers (Duh)

This mod is partially inspired by the leaked picture of Gnembon showing off "sand" layers, I thought this was a great idea and started coding this mod!
And here it is! the plan is to add a lot of layers and slab versions of different blocks! Adding to the creativity and customizability of Minecraft Vanilla!

I will keep this mod updated to the latest version of Minecraft! I will also keep adding new content to it!
Have Fun!

Enjoy the mod!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Q&A ❓️:

Q: Can I use this mod in a modpack?

A: Yes of course! I actually think this mod does better in a modpack that is centered around food, just make sure to credit me!

Q: How far in between will updates be?

A: Depends on how motivated I am feeling to code, sometimes maybe a few weeks. Other times maybe a month or two

Q: Where can I report issues/bugs?

A: Right here: https://github.com/ACgamerReal/Slabs-Layers-/issues

Q: What about compatibility?

A: I have tested a few mods toghether with this mod (Farmer's delight, Farmer's delight expanded), they all seem to work fine. If there is an incompatibility please report it to the issues github

Q: Will this mod be updated to the newest versions of minecraft?

A: Yes, I will try to update it as soon as I can.If you have any more questions feel free to leave a comment!
